title: Korak 14

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poem):
    secret_code = ''
    lines = poem.split('\n')
    for line_index, line in enumerate(lines):
        words = line.split()
        secret_code += str(len(words[line_index]))
    return secret_code

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and bright
until the end of the night"""

print(pin_extractor(poem))
challengeFiles.seed:
def pin_extractor(poem):
    secret_code = ''
    lines = poem.split('\n')
    for line_index, line in enumerate(lines):
        words = line.split()
        secret_code += str(len(words[line_index]))
    return secret_code

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and bright
until the end of the night"""

print(pin_extractor(poem))

tests.text: Inside the loop you should have an if statement.
The if statement condition should be len(words) > line_index.
Inside the if statement you should have secret_code += str(len(words[line_index])).

description:
Sada funkcija dobro radi u izvlačenju koda iz pesme, ali postoji grančan slučaj koji treba uzeti u obzir: stih pesme bi mogao biti kraći nego što se očekuje, a to bi uzrokovalo grešku u funkciji (možete pokušati da ovo uradite uklanjanjem reči bright iz pesme).

Stavite liniju secret_code += str(len(words[line_index])) u izjavu if koja proverava da li ima dovoljno reči u listi words.
